title: mari questions
wikitext:
[]: mari questions             Quote Post by Rahxephon » Thu Jun 06, 2013 6:46 pm Is her character pointless? this isnt my main question just how i will start the thread. i just want to throw it out there i dont dislike her character at all shes funny has good lines and character design. especially love it when shes singing in first scene of Q! hilarious.. but at end of day she seems kinda pointless and not enough development... In 2.22 after mari hijacks unit 02 and falls in front of Shinji .. does he even know whose piloting it? he has only met her one akward time so he really has NO idea who she is. they have no relationship not even friends at all so there's no way he should recognize her voice. He also knows Asuka is injured atm so wouldn't you think the first thing he would say would be like WHO THE FUCK IS PILOTING UNIT 02? Only thing I can think of is he was so depressed and out of it he didn't even care anymore.. hence the "I'm not ngonna pilot I'm not gonna pilot I'm noot gonna pilot"..and obviously she didn't convince him to do anything it was seeing the destruction and Rei getting eaten.. still seems kinda wierd to me though.. Do you think she will have more characterization in final? will we find out whose soul is in the core of her eva? ;)

[]: Re: mari questions             Quote Post by Ænimal » Thu Jun 06, 2013 6:52 pm Rahxephon wrote: Is her character pointless?

[]: Re: mari questions             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Thu Jun 06, 2013 6:54 pm Rahxephon wrote: Is her character pointless?

[]: Re: mari questions             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Thu Jun 06, 2013 7:03 pm Rahxephon wrote: In 2.22 after mari hijacks unit 02 and falls in front of Shinji .. does he even know whose piloting it? he has only met her one akward time so he really has NO idea who she is. they have no relationship not even friends at all so there's no way he should recognize her voice. He also knows Asuka is injured atm so wouldn't you think the first thing he would say would be like WHO THE FUCK IS PILOTING UNIT 02?

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Thu Jun 06, 2013 7:31 pm This is exactly the kind of thing that we should be withholding judgment on until after the tetralogy is finished. How can we know Mari's full significance to the story if the story isn't finished yet? People are free to be as pessimistic about Mari's role as they want to be, but "pointless" isn't a word I would be using to describe her. Not yet, anyway.

[]: Re: mari questions             Quote Post by Rahxephon » Thu Jun 06, 2013 7:48 pm Shinoyami65 wrote: Well, since they met before he might recognise her voice... I would like the see Mari see more character development in Final, although it probably won't happen at this rate.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Jun 06, 2013 7:53 pm I like her character a great deal. So pointless to the narrative or not I much appreciate her being there in lieu of not being there.

[]:             Quote Post by Toonsis » Thu Jun 06, 2013 9:38 pm riffraff11235 wrote: This is exactly the kind of thing that we should be withholding judgment on until after the tetralogy is finished. How can we know Mari's full significance to the story if the story isn't finished yet? People are free to be as pessimistic about Mari's role as they want to be, but "pointless" isn't a word I would be using to describe her. Not yet, anyway.

[]: Re: mari questions             Quote Post by gchristnsn » Fri Jun 07, 2013 2:32 am Rahxephon wrote: Is her character pointless?

[]:             Quote Post by SimplyMason0 » Fri Jun 07, 2013 8:58 am There is one more movie left to make up for it. So far, she seems pointless. She really just seems to be a plot device. She just comes of as shallow fanservice I think she might be Asuka's mother clone like Rei with Yui. It would be funny with all the yuri the fans have made. However, she knows about Gendo so there is something going on.

[]:             Quote Post by Charsi » Fri Jun 07, 2013 9:23 am It feels like Rebuild 1.11 and 2.22 are literally a Reconstruction of Evangelion (after the original deconstruction of the giant robot genre). It's on it's way to being a giant robot fest with some angst, and then suddenly 3.33 nopes out on it all. Mari is kind of part of that Reconstruction. She's an anomaly: a pilot with no problems, no hidden suffering. She just enjoys piloting and is generally a happy person. It's like the character exists to contradict all the angst ridden, suffering laden characters of the original Evangelion. I have all kinds of other fanwanked theories but setting wild plots aside, the character itself is so obnoxiously untroubled relative to the perceived norm she feels like a Mary Sue.

[]:             Quote Post by Redtophat » Fri Jun 07, 2013 2:07 pm What if she's the UN's counterpart to Nerv's Rei and Seele's Kaworu as Kyouko's clone? Even that is far-fetched and her role would probably be mission control on the Eva vs Angels or some shit like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Fri Jun 07, 2013 11:04 pm June wrote: What if she's the UN's counterpart to Nerv's Rei and Seele's Kaworu as Kyouko's clone? Even that is far-fetched and her role would probably be mission control on the Eva vs Angels or some shit like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Fri Jun 07, 2013 11:26 pm I think everyone should just set themselves up for disappointment as far as Mari's ultimate thematic purpose in this series is concerned. It's all going to amount to an asspull, if even that.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Sat Jun 08, 2013 8:10 am Shinoyami65 wrote: What's all this stuff about the UN? For all we know the UN may have been blasted into oblivion by 3I and the only organisations left on Earth are Nerv, SEELE and Wille. We never actually hear any mentions of the UN having a hand in the events of the movies. The IPEA, on the other hand, could be Mari's mystery organisation.

[]:             Quote Post by moonwolf2024 » Sat Jun 08, 2013 11:32 am You know....i never saw what the big deal is over Mari being added. I like her character. She's funny and to the point. It's a nice contrast to darker points of Rebuild. I'm pretty sure she serves a purpose, but I have no high hopes that she'll add to some spectacular plot twist. Anyway, when it comes to Eva i've learned to keep my hopes low as I KNOW i'm gonna get hit with a curve ball.

[]:             Quote Post by wiser3754 » Sat Jun 29, 2013 6:26 pm Let me add something about Mari, remember Gendo's infidelity in NGE to the Akagi's, who's to say he didn't have something going on with Mari's mother, hence Mari may be Shinji's and Asuka's half sister? Here comes the rain of comments.

[]:             Quote Post by Karex_Usyrion » Sat Jun 29, 2013 10:43 pm Mari is Shinji's and Asuka's half sister via Gendo with Asuka's mother or Shinji's and Asuka's daughter. My half-cent is on Shinji's and Asuka's daughter. There are many details seeded on purpose: similar blue eyed expressions (Asuka's), the heavy breathing and same pose when piloting (Shinji's) , Mari's attraction to Shinji and Asuka at first sight, liking the smell of Shinji and of Asuka. Mari's exact glasses in the old Fuyutsuki photo in Q are on someone who is more likely to be Asuka's mother than some new previously unpresented or random character.

[]:             Quote Post by wiser3754 » Sun Jun 30, 2013 6:59 am Karex_Usyrion wrote: Mari is Shinji's and Asuka's half sister via Gendo with Asuka's mother or Shinji's and Asuka's daughter. My half-cent is on Shinji's and Asuka's daughter. There are many details seeded on purpose: similar blue eyed expressions (Asuka's), the heavy breathing and same pose when piloting (Shinji's) , Mari's attraction to Shinji and Asuka at first sight, liking the smell of Shinji and of Asuka. Mari's exact glasses in the old Fuyutsuki photo in Q are on someone who is more likely to be Asuka's mother than some new previously unpresented or random character.
